instruction: What are the Top 10 overall universities in Pakistan according to HEC and global metrics?
output: The Top 10 overall universities in Pakistan based on academic reputation, research output, and national HEC status are: 1. Quaid-i-Azam University (QAU), 2. National University of Sciences & Technology (NUST), 3. Lahore University of Management Sciences (LUMS), 4. University of the Punjab, 5. University of Engineering & Technology (UET) Lahore, 6. Aga Khan University (AKU), 7. COMSATS University Islamabad, 8. University of Karachi, 9. Pakistan Institute of Engineering and Applied Sciences (PIEAS), and 10. Government College University (GCU) Lahore.

instruction: What are the Top Medical universities and colleges in Pakistan?
output: The top-tier medical institutions and universities in Pakistan recognized for outstanding clinical training and healthcare research include: 1. Aga Khan University (AKU) Karachi, 2. National University of Medical Sciences (NUMS) Rawalpindi, 3. King Edward Medical University (KEMU) Lahore, 4. Dow University of Health Sciences (DUHS) Karachi, 5. University of Health Sciences (UHS) Lahore, 6. Khyber Medical University (KMU) Peshawar, 7. Jinnah Sindh Medical University (JSMU) Karachi, 8. Nishtar Medical University Multan, 9. Faisalabad Medical University, and 10. Fatima Jinnah Medical University Lahore.

instruction: What are the Top Engineering universities in Pakistan?
output: The premier engineering institutions in Pakistan recognized for technical training and architectural or aerospace streams are: 1. National University of Sciences & Technology (NUST) Islamabad, 2. University of Engineering & Technology (UET) Lahore, 3. Pakistan Institute of Engineering and Applied Sciences (PIEAS) Islamabad, 4. Ghulam Ishaq Khan Institute (GIKI) Swabi, 5. COMSATS University Islamabad, 6. NED University of Engineering & Technology Karachi, 7. Mehran University of Engineering & Technology Jamshoro, 8. Air University Islamabad, and 9. Institute of Space Technology (IST) Islamabad.
